languages.text: Вашими стараниями и силами слуг Адептус Механикус, это устройство превратилось в настоящий шедевр, переполненный благостью Омниссии.
Through your efforts and those of the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this device has been transformed into a masterpiece overflowing with the grace of the Omnissiah.
languages.original_text: Вашими стараниями и силами слуг Адептус Механикус, это устройство превратилось в настоящий шедевр, переполненный благостью Омниссии.

traits.locale_text: Through your efforts and those of the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this device has been transformed into a masterpiece overflowing with the grace of the Omnissiah.
Through your efforts and those of the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this device has been transformed into a masterpiece overflowing with the grace of the Omnissiah.
Through your efforts and those of the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this device has been transformed into a masterpiece overflowing with the grace of the Omnissiah.

languages.text: 貴方の努力と機械神官団の奉仕者たちの努力によって、この装置はオムニシアの恵みで溢れる傑作へと変貌を遂げました。
languages.original_text: Through your efforts and those of the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this device has been transformed into a masterpiece overflowing with the grace of the Omnissiah.

languages.text: Senin ve Adeptus Mechanicus hizmetkârlarının çabalarıyla bu cihaz, Hermesih'in lütfuyla dolup taşan bir şahesere dönüşmüş hâlde.
languages.original_text: Through your efforts and those of the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this device has been transformed into a masterpiece overflowing with the grace of the Omnissiah.

traits.locale_text: Senin ve Adeptus Mechanicus hizmetkârlarının çabalarıyla bu cihaz, Hermesih'in lütfuyla dolup taşan bir şahesere dönüşmüş hâlde.

languages.text: 得益于你与机械修会忠仆们的共同努力，此装置已脱胎换骨，成为流淌着欧姆尼赛亚恩典的杰作。
languages.original_text: Through your efforts and those of the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this device has been transformed into a masterpiece overflowing with the grace of the Omnissiah.

traits.locale_text: 得益于你与机械修会忠仆们的共同努力，此装置已脱胎换骨，成为流淌着欧姆尼赛亚恩典的杰作。

languages.text: Dank deiner Bemühungen und der Arbeit der Diener des Adeptus Mechanicus ist dieses Gerät wieder ein Meisterstück, das von der überbordenden Gnade des Omnissiah erfüllt ist.
languages.original_text: Through your efforts and those of the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this device has been transformed into a masterpiece overflowing with the grace of the Omnissiah.

traits.locale_text: Dank deiner Bemühungen und der Arbeit der Diener des Adeptus Mechanicus ist dieses Gerät wieder ein Meisterstück, das von der überbordenden Gnade des Omnissiah erfüllt ist.

languages.text: Grâce à vos efforts et à l’aide des serviteurs de l'Adeptus Mechanicus, cet appareil a été transformé et déborde maintenant de la grâce de l'Omnimessie.
languages.original_text: Through your efforts and those of the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this device has been transformed into a masterpiece overflowing with the grace of the Omnissiah.

traits.locale_text: Grâce à vos efforts et à l’aide des serviteurs de l'Adeptus Mechanicus, cet appareil a été transformé et déborde maintenant de la grâce de l'Omnimessie.

languages.text: Gracias a tus esfuerzos y los de los sirvientes del Adeptus Mechanicus, esta máquina se ha transformado en una obra maestra que desprende la gracia del Omnissiah.
languages.original_text: Through your efforts and those of the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this device has been transformed into a masterpiece overflowing with the grace of the Omnissiah.

traits.locale_text: Gracias a tus esfuerzos y los de los sirvientes del Adeptus Mechanicus, esta máquina se ha transformado en una obra maestra que desprende la gracia del Omnissiah.
